mapper.insert:
select SEQ_ATTACHMENT.NEXTVAL from dual
insert into T_ATTACHMENT (L_ID, ATT_NAME, ATT_PATH, ATT_TYPE, ATT_FLAG, PID, UPDATE_TIME) values (#{lId,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{attName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attPath,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attFlag,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{pid,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=DATE})
mapper.update: update T_ATTACHMENT set ATT_NAME = #{attName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ATT_PATH = #{attPath,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ATT_TYPE = #{attType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ATT_FLAG = #{attFlag,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, PID = #{pid,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, UPDATE_TIME = #{updateTime,jdbcType=DATE} where L_ID = #{lId,jdbcType=DECIMAL}
mapper.select: select L_ID, ATT_NAME, ATT_PATH, ATT_TYPE, ATT_FLAG, PID, UPDATE_TIME from T_ATTACHMENT
